_comment: Authoritative post manifest. PUBLISH CONTROL: a post goes live only when published=true AND publish_date<=today (the static site must be rebuilt for a scheduled date to take effect — re-run build.py). Default is draft. order = display order on the index. kit = folder under content_kits_root. slug = output filename + canonical path. 'note' flags posts whose source contains author NEEDS-SOURCING markers — verify those claims before publishing.

posts.note: verify the 90-second amygdala figure (attributed to Jill Bolte Taylor)
ADHD dorsal-shutdown section flagged NEEDS SOURCING (polyvagal + ADHD overlap)
interest-based NS model (Barkley), Dr. K 'dirty motivator', dopamine biochemistry, urgency-as-activator all flagged
somatic-school claims summarized from SECONDARY sources; add a reader-facing source caveat before publishing
masking allostatic-load data + burnout-vs-depression clinical criteria flagged NEEDS SOURCING
RSD metabolic-cost differential 'not independently measured in source material'
